problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Glial. Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
